title: xTokenSMP Season 2
description: Custom Mob Tokens with Unique Abilities and Visual Flair!
body:
# ⚔️ xTokenSMP Season 2 - New Season, New Era!

> **Note:** For the best experience, use the provided Texture Pack in your client.

---

## 🪙 Token System

xTokenSMP introduces **7 unique tokens**, each granting bonus hearts and powerful custom abilities.

### 🌪️ Breeze Token

* Tornado
* Mace Jump
* Breeze Form

### 👁️ Enderman Token

* Snap Teleport
* Force Teleport
* Enderman Form

### 🔥 Ghast Token

* Ember Ball
* Hell Rain
* Ghast Form

### 🏹 Skeleton Token

* Arrow Strike
* One-Shot Arrow
* Skeleton Form

### 🌋 Magma Token

* Firequake
* Lava Trap
* Magma Form

### 🐬 Dolphin Token

* Riptide
* Frost Byte
* Dolphin Form

### 💥 Creeper Token

* Orbital Stab
* Orbital Strike
* Creeper Form

---

## 🎮 Ability Activation

All token abilities use simple key combinations:

| Action              | Ability           |
| ------------------- | ----------------- |
| Shift + Right Click | Primary Ability   |
| Shift + Left Click  | Secondary Ability |
| Shift + F           | Ultimate Ability  |

---

## ⬆️ Token Upgrades

Every token can be upgraded up to **Level 3**.

### Upgrade Features

* Fully configurable upgrade recipes
* Increased ability power
* Enhanced effects
* Longer durations
* Improved performance with each level

---

## ❤️ Life System

Players begin with **4 lives**.

### Features

* Lives displayed in the Action Bar
* Losing all lives results in a ban
* Lives can be:

  * Withdrawn into items
  * Traded with other players
  * Stored and transferred

---

## ✨ Revival Ritual System

When a player loses all lives and gets banned, they can be revived through a ritual.

### How It Works

1. Obtain the player's **Revive Card**
2. Place a **Beacon**
3. Insert the Revive Card
4. A ritual structure is automatically generated
5. Protect the beacon until the ritual completes (Default: 15 minutes)
6. The player is revived

---

## 📜 Commands

| Command                                | Description               | Permission        |
| -------------------------------------- | ------------------------- | ----------------- |
| `/token give <player> <token> [level]` | Give a token              | `xtokensmp.admin` |
| `/token giveall <player>`              | Give all tokens           | `xtokensmp.admin` |
| `/token setlives <player> <amount>`    | Set player lives          | `xtokensmp.admin` |
| `/token revive <player>`               | Instantly revive a player | `xtokensmp.admin` |
| `/token skipritual`                    | Skip active rituals       | `xtokensmp.admin` |
| `/token togglecooldown <player>`       | Toggle cooldowns          | `xtokensmp.admin` |
| `/token reload`                        | Reload configuration      | `xtokensmp.admin` |

---

## 🔑 Permissions

| Permission        | Description                        |
| ----------------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `xtokensmp.admin` | Full administrative access         |
| `xtokensmp.use`   | Basic plugin usage (Default: True) |

---

## ✅ Supported Platforms

* Paper
* Folia

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

This plugin is a **fan-made replica** and is **not affiliated with or endorsed by the original xTokenSMP project**.

---
